title: Create: Crystallized
description: Adds Crystal Growing to Create, opening new possibilities to automate resources!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be8a49bcc48d0f562d7f2ffbdee2d5bac27a3a02.png)

Create: Crystallized is an addon for Create that introduces crystal growing mechanics. Using slides, you can produce crystals and in turn, useful items.
It's recommended to use EMI/JEI!

Features

Liquid Crystal

Core fluid for all crystal growth.

Slides

Slides act as a base for crystal formation:

  • Glass Slide – The standard slide, breaks after 3 uses
  • Reinforced Slide – A stronger version that doesn’t break.

Nether Crystals

  • Create a nether base, and grow to obtain a nether crystal!
  • Use it to get netherrack.

Conductive (Rose Quartz) Crystals

  • Deploy a conductive compound on a slide, and grow to obtain rose quartz!

Amethyst Crystals

  • Fill any slide with liquid crystal to obtain amethyst shards!

Planned

  • Ponder scenes
  • Better recipes

Compatibility

  • Requires Create OR Create Fabric
